title: Delhi Metro to Start at 3 AM on April 5 for PNB Soldierathon 2026: Routes, Timing & Travel Details
description: DMRC will run Delhi Metro from 3 AM on April 5, 2026, for the PNB Soldierathon marathon near JLN Stadium. Trains will run at 30-minute intervals till 6 AM, check affected lines, nearest stations, and full travel advisory for commuters.
